title: Best Superspeciality hospital| Wellsun Medicity
description: Wellsun Medicity is a leading super speciality hospital in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, offering advanced healthcare services with 100+ expert doctors across 30+ departments including Cardiology, Cancer Care, Kidney Transplant, Neurosciences, Orthopaedics, Gastroenterology, Urology, and Womenâ€™s Health.
text: Best Superspeciality hospital| Wellsun Medicity < 8-B/NH-5, Vrindavan Yojna, Shaheed Path,Lucknow - 226029 18008991200 wellsunmedicityhospital@gmail.com Home About Us About Us Message From Chairman Message From MD Message From CFO Message From COO DEPARTMENTS Cardiac Science Cardiology Cardio Vascular Thoracic Surgery Renal Science Nephrology Urology & Kidney Transplant Neuro Science Neuro Medicine Neuro Surgery & Trauma Management Anaesthesia And Critical Care Pulmonary Medicine Neonatology & Pediatrics Obstetrics & Gynaecology Orthopaedics And Joint Replacement Oral And Maxillofacial surgery Minimally Invasive Laparoscopic & General Surgery General Medicine ENT Radiology Services 24*7 Emergency 24*7 Blood Bank 24*7 Pharmacy 24*7 Pathology 24*7 Dialysis 24*7 Ambulance Physiotherapy Find Doctors TPA Quick Links Our Blogs Terms & Condition Admission Information Hospital FAQs OPD Facilities Rights and Responsibilities Contact Us Ayushman Bharat Yojana Media & Gallery Get 20% Discount Login Previous Next Book Appointment GET 20 % DISCOUNT Free Consultation View Health Record Wellsun Medicity at a Glance Wellsun Medicity is a premier 200-bedded Super-specialty hospital that offers world-class healthcare services to patients from all walks of life. The hospital is equipped with state-of-the-art modular operation theatres,interventional cathlabs,and intensive care units,along with range of in-patient rooms that cater to all budgets-from economy to luxury.It strives to provide accessible, accountable,and affordable healthcare services to all members of society. The hospital is renowned for its exceptional services in Cardiac Sciences, Renal Sciences, and other specialties, all of which are staffed by highly experienced and trained medical professionals who are dedicated to provide round-the-clock care at an affordable cost. Wellsun Medicity takes pride in its capabilities in handling Interventional Cardiology and kidney transplant among other specialties.
